name: Banana Nut Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Whet Chex Cereal crushed to 1/2 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease an 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2-inch loaf pan.
3. Stir together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, baking soda, Whet Chex Cereal and nuts in a large bowl.
4. In another bowl, combine egg, oil, water, mashed bananas and vanilla.
5. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
6. Spread the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the bread to cool for 15 minutes before removing from the pan.
9. This recipe makes 1 loaf.
